fields.title: Rewrite task delegation as non-blocking agent system
fields.description:
Replace current blocking task-based delegation with codex-style non-blocking agent system.

## Goal
Match codex's collab architecture (non-blocking spawn/send/wait/close) with tau's registry design (task types with skills/tools/models).

## Key Changes
- Single `agent` tool with actions: spawn, send, wait, close, list
- Non-blocking: spawn returns immediately, explicit wait
- Inter-agent communication via send (with optional interrupt)
- Keep TaskRegistry for type→policy resolution
- Keep skill injection, complexity routing, structured output

## New API
```typescript
agent({
  action: 'spawn' | 'send' | 'wait' | 'close' | 'list',
  type?, message?, complexity?, skills?, result_schema?,  // spawn
  id?, interrupt?,                                         // send/close
  ids?, timeout_ms?                                        // wait
})
```

## Config
- max_threads: max concurrent agents (default from codex)
- max_depth: 3 (nesting limit)
- Task registry unchanged (code/search/review/planning/etc.)
fields.close_reason: Rewrite task delegation as non-blocking agent system complete
